causality.verdict: Identity dominates; macro alone explains 4% of what identity explains

structure.verdict: WEAK BUT REAL (k=2 consensus, silhouette 0.29, bootstrap ARI 0.58)

final_verdict: PRODUCTION READY (broker-tier scope); institutional tier requires 2026 confirmation
failure_mode: STRUCTURAL-ECONOMIC: internal policy break at a core lender (credit box overhaul, M&A, leadership change) violates identity persistence. Detection: 2026 per-lender z-score vs own 8-yr distribution; UWM (+6.8pp drift) is the canary.
zai_is: A structural routing system converting a stress-tested 8-year lender hierarchy into per-file lender selection with ~20pp average denial-rate edge over undirected submission.
zai_is_not: A predictor of individual loan outcomes, a macro forecaster, or a guarantee — it cannot see intra-year policy changes and its regime layer covers exactly two lenders.
